title: Sensky Motion Sensor LED Strip Lights Rechargeable Motion Activated Light Strip Dimmable Strip Light for Cabinet, Wardrobe, Cupboard, Hallway, Stairs(2M, Warm White)
features: Dimmable: 3 levels of brightness adjustable(30% 50% 100%), adjust the brightness of motion sensor LED strip lights by pressing the button, you can simply creating the brightness and ambience you need for decor and indoor lighting.

ON/OFF/AUTO Mode: AUTO mode works as motion sensor strip lights, switch on when detecting your motion, then automatic shutdown after 30 seconds of inactivity. ON and OFF modes allow you to switch the rechargeable strip light to Manual ON or OFF.

“Sun” & “Moon” Mode: Adjust to “Sun”(Only Motion Sensor Mode) mean motion sensor both works in day and night; Adjust to “Moon”(Motion and Light Sensor Mode) mean motion sensor only works in dawn or darkness situation.

USB Rechargeable: The Motion Activated Light Strip is powered by built-in 2200mAh lithium battery, long time to use. USB rechargeable, can be connected to Power Bank, Computer, Charger...For your convenience, we also provide usb data cable.

Stick on Anywhere: This motion sensor led strip is ideal for the bedroom, baby room, closet, cabinet, corridor, workshop, basement, garage, stairwell, oil depots, door, garage entrances and other places.
description: Product Description Attention ：Not recommended for use while charging. When charging, the indicator light will illuminate. If you simultaneously turn on the light sensor button, it may affect the sensor's judgement of the environment and may not light up the strip. Rechargeable Motion Sensor: Input Voltage: DC 5V Output Voltage: DC 5V Max Load Current: 2A Connector: 5.5*2.1mm DC Connector Detection Angle: 120° Detection Range: 2.4-3 Meters Delay Time: 30-33s Charging Port: MircoUSB Battery Capacity: 2200mah LED Strip: Length of Strip Light: 2M Color Temperature: 3000K Rated Power: 2.4W/M Package Contents: 1. USB Rechargeable Motion Sensor x 1 2. LED Strip Light x 1 3. USB Data Cable x 1 4. Adhesive Tape x 2 5. User Manual x 1 Notes: 1. Don't install in a place with strong wind and heat to avoid any false triggering. 2. The operating temperature should be -5°C~40°C, otherwise there may be false triggering. 3. Avoid installing near fans and air conditioners to avoid false alarms caused by temperature changes. 4. If battery power runs out, the led strip will not light up under any mode. Please recharge the sensor.
